subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The inevitable fate hath overtaken those who sought the gate of Thy mercy, thronged by multitudes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد ادرک ریب المنون هولاء الذین قصدوا باب رحمتک المزدحم بالوفود قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
